title: onagra depressa
intro: Onagra depressa, also known as the evening primrose, is a biennial flowering plant native to North America. The medicinal properties of Onagra depressa lie in its seeds, which are rich in essential fatty acids, particularly gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a potent anti-inflammatory compound. The health benefits of Onagra depressa include reducing symptoms of eczema, psoriasis, and other skin conditions, as well as alleviating menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Onagra depressa include capsules, oils, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
